text.div:
Id: IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccines
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-04-03 22:35:55+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines Polysaccharide vaccines schedule (Polysaccharide vaccines can be used to control outbreaks in countries where limited economic resources or insufficient supply restrict the use of meningococcal conjugate vaccines)
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for Meningococcal.: Determine if the client is due for Meningococcal vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Polysaccharide vaccines schedule (Polysaccharide vaccines can be used to control outbreaks in countries where limited economic resources or insufficient supply restrict the use of meningococcal conjugate vaccines)
If: Applicability: Client is due for meningococcal vaccination (Client is due for meningococcal vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE10', display: 'Meningococcal vaccines' } }, display: 'Meningococcal vaccines' })
Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines.: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines.
If: Applicability: Has Guidance (Has Guidance)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

extension.valueString: IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Years

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in years
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Years":
  AgeInYearsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 2 years
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance
IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Meningococcal Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Meningococcal containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Meningococcal Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Meningococcal vaccines"
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Meningococcal Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Number of Meningococcal Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
No meningococcal primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 2 years
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age is more than 2 years
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
One meningococcal primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Date of Latest Primary Meningococcal Dose
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
The latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
The primary series is complete. Client is not due for meningococcal booster dose.
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
The primary series is complete. Client is not due for meningococcal booster dose. Guidance
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
The latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Meningococcal Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Number of Meningococcal Booster Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
No meningococcal booster dose was administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
The primary series is complete. Clinical judgement is required for meningococcal booster dose. Create a clinical note
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
The primary series is complete. Clinical judgement is required for meningococcal booster dose. Create a clinical note Guidance
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Meningococcal booster dose was administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination" then "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination" then "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance"
    when "The primary series is complete. Client is not due for meningococcal booster dose." then "The primary series is complete. Client is not due for meningococcal booster dose. Guidance"
    when "The primary series is complete. Clinical judgement is required for meningococcal booster dose. Create a clinical note" then "The primary series is complete. Clinical judgement is required for meningococcal booster dose. Create a clinical note Guidance"
    when "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete" then "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccinesLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )
IMMZCommon
seriesBooster

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series
 */
define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )

parameter.name: Client is due for meningococcal vaccination

name: IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolysaccharideVaccines
title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines
description:
IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Polysaccharide vaccines
Polysaccharide vaccines schedule
(Polysaccharide vaccines can be used to control outbreaks in countries where limited economic resources or insufficient supply restrict the use of meningococcal conjugate vaccines)

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown:
Polysaccharide vaccines should be administered to individuals aged ≥ 2 years as one single dose.
One booster 3–5 years after the primary dose may be given to persons considered to be a continued high risk of exposure, including some health workers.
